GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: Cabazitaxel vs Mitoxantrone in mCRPC progressing after docetaxel (NCT00417079).

MetaDataVersion.Name: TROPIC Trial ADaM Metadata Specification
MetaDataVersion.Description: Metadata specification for TROPIC Phase III re-analysis ADaM datasets

Description.TranslatedText: Subject-level characteristics, treatment allocations, survival, and baseline covariates.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADEX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit

Description.TranslatedText: Cycle-level actual dose performance, cumulative exposure, actual/planned dose intensities, and RDI calculations.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADCM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per medication

Description.TranslatedText: Concomitant medication usage including G-CSF prophylaxis markers, prednisone compliance, and NACT timelines.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per adverse event

Description.TranslatedText: Treatment-emergent adverse events, severity classifications, serious AEs, and custom myelosuppressive episode merging.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADLB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit

Description.TranslatedText: Longitudinal absolute laboratory measurements, CTCAE grading, Worst-in-window flags (ANL01FL), and continuous nadir models.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADRS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit

Description.TranslatedText: RECIST v1.0 soft-tissue assessments, bone-lesion scan progression tracking, objective responses, and PSA progressions.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADTTE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per time-to-event parameter

Description.TranslatedText: Survival endpoints including Overall Survival (OS), Progression-Free Survival (PFS), TTPSA, and time-to-SAE endpoints.
Date of First Exposure to Treatment
Date of Last Exposure to Treatment
Not collected in the public MP SDTM release; single population-reference constant for all subjects (placeholder; see ADRG 5.1). ALBBLIF='Y' for all records.
Not collected in the public MP SDTM release; single population-reference constant for all subjects (placeholder; see ADRG 5.1). LDHBLIF='Y' for all records.
'Y' if ECOGBL was imputed to the protocol default (no baseline ECOG on file), else 'N'.
'Y' if PSABL was imputed to the population-median fallback (no baseline PSA on file), else 'N'.
'Y' if ALPBL was imputed to the population-median fallback (no baseline ALP on file), else 'N'.
'Y' if HGBBL was imputed to the population-median fallback (no baseline hemoglobin on file), else 'N'.
Constant 'Y' — ALBBL is a non-collected placeholder constant for all subjects.
Constant 'Y' — LDHBL is a non-collected placeholder constant for all subjects.
Date of First Exposure to Treatment
Reported Name of Drug, Med, or Therapy
First Date of New Anti-Cancer Therapy
Date of First Exposure to Treatment
Reference Range Lower Limit in Orig Unit
Reference Range Upper Limit in Orig Unit
Result or Finding in Original Units
Date of First Exposure to Treatment

Decode.TranslatedText: Dose Adjusted due to AE Flag
Minimum post-baseline ANC value per cycle
Days from nadir to first ANC recovery
Time to First Serious Adverse Event

Description.TranslatedText: Date of first exposure to treatment, derived as the minimum of EXSTDTC from the EX SDTM dataset.
Date of last exposure to treatment, derived as the maximum of EXENDTC from the EX SDTM dataset.
Treatment duration in days, calculated as: TRTEDT - TRTSDT + 1.
Intent-to-treat population flag, set to Y for all randomized subjects.
Safety population flag, set to Y for all subjects who received at least one dose of study treatment.
Baseline ECOG performance status, derived as the first non-missing value from VS where VSTESTCD = 'ECOG' and VSBLFL = 'Y'.
Baseline measurable disease flag, set to Y if target lesions are present at baseline in the LS SDTM dataset.
Baseline pain assessment flag, set to Y if baseline pain intensity is >= 2 or baseline analgesic score is >= 10.
Relative Dose Intensity, calculated as (Actual cumulative dose administered / Planned cumulative dose) * 100.
Relative Dose Intensity Category, classified as >=85%, 65-<85%, or <65% based on RDI.
Number of treatment cycles received, derived as the max of visit number from EX.
Minimum absolute neutrophil count (ANC) value observed post-baseline during Cycle 1.
Time-to-event duration in days, calculated as: ADT - STARTDT + 1.
Censoring indicator, set to 0 if the event occurred, or 1 if censored.
Sequence index increments when chronological gap between myeloid AEs is > 3 days, representing separate clinical episodes.
Calculates minimum post-baseline ANC value per cycle for individual patients to model continuous dose-toxicity relationships.
Identifies the start date of any post-baseline systemic anti-cancer therapy, acting as the primary censor-date boundary for PFS calculations.
Stratified Cox proportional-hazards and log-rank analyses of OS and PFS (CbzP vs MP), stratified by ECOGBL and MEASDISF, per SAP v3.0 §5.1.
Overall Survival — stratified Cox HR and stratified log-rank p-value, CbzP vs MP.

arm:ProgrammingCode.arm:Code: coxph(Surv(AVAL, 1 - CNSR) ~ TRT01P + strata(ECOGBL, MEASDISF), data = adtte[PARAMCD=='OS'])

Description.TranslatedText: Progression-Free Survival — stratified Cox HR and stratified log-rank p-value, CbzP vs MP.

arm:ProgrammingCode.arm:Code: coxph(Surv(AVAL, 1 - CNSR) ~ TRT01P + strata(ECOGBL, MEASDISF), data = adtte[PARAMCD=='PFS'])

Description.TranslatedText: Unstratified Cox proportional-hazards analyses of the secondary time-to-event endpoints (Time to PSA Progression; Time to Tumor Progression, measurable-disease subpopulation), CbzP vs MP, per SAP v3.0 sections 5.3-5.4.
Time to PSA Progression - Cox HR and log-rank p-value, CbzP vs MP.
Time to Tumor Progression (measurable-disease subpopulation) - Cox HR and log-rank p-value, CbzP vs MP.
Incidence of treatment-emergent adverse events (TRTEMFL='Y') by MedDRA preferred term and treatment, per SAP v3.0 section 5.2 (table T-20).
TEAE incidence (subjects with at least one event) by preferred term, CbzP vs MP.

arm:ProgrammingCode.arm:Code: adae[TRTEMFL=='Y'] |> distinct(USUBJID, TRTA, AEDECOD) |> count(TRTA, AEDECOD)
